rationale: The citing paper explicitly states it “extends processing-fluency and metacognition research,” and its focal constructs (processing fluency, metacognitive experiences, naive theories) strongly overlap with the cited paper’s core contribution on conceptual/perceptual fluency effects in brand evaluation.
